description: Acquerello aged carnaroli rice simmered in slow-cooked porcini broth, topped with shaved black winter truffle and micro herbs.

description: Seared premium Miyazaki A5 Wagyu beef slices served with a vibrant fresh herb chimichurri sauce and roasted fingerling potatoes.

description: Pan-seared tender Chilean sea bass fillet, nested on fresh asparagus spears and finished with a rich lemon herb butter reduction.

description: Molten Belgian dark chocolate soufflé with a warm gooey center, finished with edible 24k gold dust and Madagascar vanilla bean gelato.
